title: STAT+: A 2023 health AI bet that seems to be paying off
summary: In this edition of STAT's AI Prognosis: A chat with Qualified Health co-founder and CEO, Justin Norden, as the company raises $125 million.

title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Merck acquisition, the rise of former Loxo execs at Lilly, and more
summary: Merck intends to buy Terns Pharmaceuticals, the developer of a promising leukemia treatment, for $6.7 billion
summary_ko: Merck가 Terns Pharmaceuticals를 67억 달러에 인수하기로 했다. 이는 백혈병 치료제 시장에서 경쟁력을 갖춘 제품을 확보하는 것과 관련이 있다.

title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium — which one analyst described as a "steal" — may leave room for a competing bid.
summary_ko: Merck가 Terns Pharmaceuticals를 67억 달러에 인수하기로 했다. 이는 백혈병 치료제 시장에서 경쟁력을 갖춘 제품을 확보하는 것과 관련이 있다.

title: Chevron Warns California Facing Historic Fuel Crisis As Diesel Hits Record $7
summary:
Chevron Warns California Facing Historic Fuel Crisis As Diesel Hits Record $7

            The world's biggest energy execs are currently at the annual CERAWeek conclave in Houston where, understandably, they are dropping bulletin bombs reeking of fire and brimstone, and warning the already critical oil/gas situation will only get worse if the pre-war status quo isn't restored (which incidentally will be great for their bottom lines... until the world is tipped into a recession).

Take US oil gi
summary_ko: 체브론이 캘리포니아 주에서 역사적인 연료 위기를 경고했다. 디젤 가격이 기록적인 7달러를 돌파했다.

title: STAT+: FDA approves Denali Therapeutics drug for Hunter syndrome
summary: The FDA approved a new medicine from Denali Therapeutics for Hunter syndrome, a notable decision by the agency after a string of rejections of rare disease drugs.

title: STAT+: Sarepta Therapeutics shares rise on early promise for rare disease drugs
summary: Sarepta Therapeutics’ next crop of medicines for muscular dystrophy appear to be safe and effective in early clinical trials, the company said.
summary_ko: Sarepta Therapeutics의 근이영양증 치료제가 초기 임상시험에서 안전성과 효능을 보였다.

title: Beam posts positive data on base editing treatment for AATD
summary: Updated data showed the biotech's approach to the rare lung and liver condition helped restore functional protective proteins in a small study.
summary_ko: Beam의 기초 편집 치료제가 희귀 폐 및 간 질환에 대한 초기 데이터에서 긍정적인 결과를 보였다.

title: Sarepta sees early success with RNAi drugs from Arrowhead
summary: Long-awaited results from Phase 1/2 studies lifted Sarepta’s stock and, according to the company, suggest potential for two medicines to treat muscle-weakening conditions.
summary_ko: Sarepta의 RNAi 치료제가 근무력증 치료에 대한 초기 성공을 보였다.

title: Beam looks to accelerated approval for AATD base editing after promising update
summary:
Beam Therapeutics has provided a much-awaited update on its therapy that uses a form of CRISPR called base editing to precisely fix a single genetic typo responsible for a rare genetic disease.
 On Wednesday,
summary_ko: Beam Therapeutics는 AATD 베이스 편집 기술을 사용한 치료제에 대해 가속 승인을 목표로 하고 있습니다. 이는 희귀 유전병을 치료하기 위한 새로운 접근입니다.
